description: Template for recording Microsoft Graph API configuration for MJU-DRP

Sites.Selected.justification: Read metadata from MJU Document Registry site only

test_queries.name: Get Site
test_queries.purpose: Verify Graph connectivity to the permitted site

test_queries.name: Get Libraries
test_queries.purpose: List all document libraries and their Drive IDs

test_queries.name: Get Lists
test_queries.purpose: List all SharePoint lists and their List IDs

test_queries.name: Get Columns
test_queries.purpose: List column definitions and internal names

test_queries.name: Get Drive Items
test_queries.purpose: List items in a document library

notes: Sites.Selected restricts access to a single site only
Replace __PLACEHOLDER__ values after site is provisioned and app is registered
Do NOT commit real client secrets to the repository
